# Thomas Haggath — Senior AWS Cloud Engineer

> Senior AWS Cloud Engineer at Amazon Web Services, specialising in security incident
> response, detection engineering, and GuardDuty. UK-based; relocating to Chicago.
> Open to U.S. cloud security roles. H-1B and L-1 sponsorship available.

## About
- Full name: Thomas Haggath
- Role: Senior AWS Cloud Engineer
- Employer: Amazon Web Services (Amazon Managed Services)
- Tenure: 7+ years at AWS Managed Services (Jun 2019 — present)
- Location: Wiltshire, UK (Chicago-bound; open to U.S. roles broadly)
- Education: BSc Digital Forensics and Cyber Security, Bournemouth University

## Expertise
- AWS security incident response (NIST 800-61) — 3+ years primary discipline
- Detection engineering: GuardDuty, CloudTrail, VPC Flow Logs, Security Hub, Macie
- SIEM: Splunk SPL — rule authoring, alert tuning, threat hunting
- IaC and landing zones: Terraform, Control Tower, Landing Zone Accelerator
- Endpoint and network security: CrowdStrike, Trend Micro IPS/IDS, Nessus
- Automation: Python incident response tooling, PowerShell, Bash
- Vulnerability and patch management at enterprise scale

## Credentials
- BSc Digital Forensics and Cyber Security, Bournemouth University
- Security Incident Response Subject Matter Expert (AWS) — https://www.credly.com/badges/92444f74-420e-4f95-9a43-4f044f531c28/public_url

- Splunk Fundamentals
- AWS Partner: Generative AI Essentials
- Azure Cloud Fundamentals

## Projects
- haggath.re (Personal Resume Website) — static HTML/CSS/JS site with CI/CD via GitHub Actions, OVH hosting, Cloudflare CDN, SRI hashes, CSP headers — https://www.haggath.re
- automated-ctfs — TypeScript CLI automating full HackTheBox recon pipeline (nmap, nikto, gobuster, enum4linux) with HTB VPN lifecycle management via WSL bridge — https://github.com/Koalatyyy/hackthebox-automation-script
- AWS Security Observatory — Flask-based security operations platform aggregating GuardDuty, CloudTrail, Security Hub, Inspector, Macie, and AWS Config with AI-powered threat detection and CloudFormation/CodePipeline CI/CD — https://github.com/Koalatyyy/aws-security-siem
- PacketTracer — real-time network packet capture and topology visualisation tool (PyQt6, NetworkX) with BPF filtering — https://github.com/Koalatyyy/PacketTracer
- Phishing Header Analyzer — browser-based email header/URL phishing analysis tool; no server or API keys; SPF/DKIM/DMARC checks, URL heuristics, 63 unit tests — https://github.com/Koalatyyy/phishing-analysis-app
- A-LiME — Python tooling for automated cross-compilation of Linux kernel modules and memory extraction with ADB integration — https://github.com/Koalatyyy/A-LiME
